title: I Just Called to Say I Love You
why_this_song: I Just Called to Say I Love You by Stevie Wonder (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "called" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "called" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "heart" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "heart" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: No New Year's Day to celebrate
No summer's high, no warm July

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: No chocolate covered candy hearts to give away
I just called to say I love you
But what it is, is something true

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "I Just Called to Say I Love You" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "I Just Called to Say I Love You", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I Just Called to Say I Love You" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I Just Called to Say I Love You" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "I Just Called to Say I Love You", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "I Just Called to Say I Love You", o que aconteceria?
